$comment: generated by the ocm schema generation tool
title: S3
description:
S3 is the input method specification for sourcing a resource from a single blob
(object) stored in an S3 or S3-compatible bucket during component construction.
The downloaded object is stored as a local blob in the component version. It
mirrors the fields of the S3 access type.

bucketName.description: BucketName is the name of the bucket that holds the object.

endpoint.description:
Endpoint is the base endpoint of an S3-compatible store (e.g. MinIO, Ceph,
R2). When empty, AWS S3 is targeted.

insecureSkipTLSVerify.description: InsecureSkipTLSVerify disables TLS certificate verification for the endpoint.

mediaType.description: MediaType is the media type of the referenced object.

objectKey.description: ObjectKey is the key (path) of the object within the bucket.

region.description:
Region is the region of the bucket. Optional; when empty it is resolved from
the environment or defaulted, and is typically ignored for custom endpoints.

usePathStyle.description:
UsePathStyle enables path-style addressing (bucket in the path instead of the
host). Required by most self-hosted S3-compatible stores.

version.description:
Version pins a specific S3 object version (versionId). When empty the latest
version is read.

ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.$comment: this core runtime schema was automatically included by the ocm schema generation tool to allow introspection
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.title: Type
ocm.software.open-component-model.bindin.description: Type represents a structured type with an optional version and a name. It is used to identify the type of an object in a versioned API.
